title: Kyiv: Update: Former Ukrainian presidents renounce Polish Order of White...
title_en: Kyiv: Update: Former Ukrainian presidents renounce Polish Order of White...
title_uk: Київ: Оновлення: колишні президенти України відмовляються від польського ордена Білої...
description: Update: Former Ukrainian presidents renounce Polish Order of White Eagle in solidarity with Zelensky. Three former Ukrainian presidents — Leonid Kuchma, Viktor Yuschenko, and Petro Poroshenko — announced on June 20 that they would voluntarily surrender their Order of the White Eagle honors after Polish President Karol Nawrocki stripped the title from Volodymyr Zelensky.
description_en: Update: Former Ukrainian presidents renounce Polish Order of White Eagle in solidarity with Zelensky. Three former Ukrainian presidents — Leonid Kuchma, Viktor Yuschenko, and Petro Poroshenko — announced on June 20 that they would voluntarily surrender their Order of the White Eagle honors after Polish President Karol Nawrocki stripped the title from Volodymyr Zelensky.
description_uk: Update: Former Ukrainian presidents renounce Polish Order of White Eagle in solidarity with Zelensky. Three former Ukrainian presidents — Leonid Kuchma, Viktor Yuschenko, and Petro Poroshenko — announced on June 20 that they would voluntarily surrender their Order of the White Eagle honors after Polish President Karol Nawrocki stripped the title from Volodymyr Zelensky.

title: Kyiv: Air raid alert
description: Russia preparing 'new massive strike,' Zelensky warns. "Tonight and in the coming hours, we must pay particularly close attention to air raid alerts," President Volodymyr Zelensky told Ukrainians in his evening address on June 20.

title: Zaporizhzhia: 5 killed, 10 injured
description: At least 5 dead, 10 injured in Russian bombing in Zaporizhzhia. Russian forces launched nine glide bombs on the regional capital, according to preliminary information, Governor Ivan Fedorov said. One victim's body was recovered from the rubble of a destroyed home. Five people have been killed, and at least 10 injured. Photos: Ivan Fedorov / Telegram
description_en: At least 5 dead, 10 injured in Russian bombing in Zaporizhzhia. title: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil, gas sites in Crimea and Siberia. Ukrainian forces hit four gas compressors in Russian-occupied Crimea and an oil refinery in the Siberian city of Tyumen on June 20, as Kyiv continues its campaign against Russia’s energy sector to throttle Moscow’s war machine.
description_en: Ukrainian drones strike Russian oil, gas sites in Crimea and Siberia. Ukrainian forces hit four gas compressors in Russian-occupied Crimea and an oil refinery in the Siberian city of Tyumen on June 20, as Kyiv continues its campaign against Russia’s energy sector to throttle Moscow’s war machine.

title: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the...

title_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що орден...
description: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_en: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що Орден Білого Орла не є звичайною відзнакою. Це символ найвищої довіри Речі Посполитої. Він означає особливий зв’язок із Польською державою та особливу вдячність народу. Такий символ вимагає не лише заслуг, але й поваги до цінностей, які становлять фундамент нашої спільноти. Отже, якщо вважається, що цей особливий символ може залишатись у Катерини...

title: Moscow Refinery today. Photo ✅The factory has stopped processing. The...
title_en: Moscow Refinery today. Photo ✅The factory has stopped processing. The...
title_uk: Московський НПЗ сьогодні. Фото ✅Завод припинив обробку. ...
description: Moscow Refinery today. Photo ✅The factory has stopped processing. The primary oil processing plant AVT-6, a combined oil processing plant (KUPN), three tanks of 10,000 cubic meters, one of 30,000 cubic meters were affected. In the pictures, two RVS tanks (30,000 and 10,000) have been completely destroyed. 🔥 Glory to Ukraine! 🇺🇦🇺🇦🇺🇦
description_en: Moscow Refinery today. Photo ✅The factory has stopped processing. The primary oil processing plant AVT-6, a combined oil processing plant (KUPN), three tanks of 10,000 cubic meters, one of 30,000 cubic meters were affected. In the pictures, two RVS tanks (30,000 and 10,000) have been completely destroyed. 🔥 Glory to Ukraine! 🇺🇦🇺🇦🇺🇦
description_uk: Московський НПЗ сьогодні. Фото ✅Завод зупинив переробку. Уражено установку первинної переробки нафти АВТ-6, комбіновану установку переробки нафти (КУПН), три резервуари 10 000 м куб, один - 30 000 м куб. На знімках - два резервуари РВС (30 тис і 10 тис) повністю знищено.🔥 Слава Україні!🇺🇦🇺🇦🇺🇦

title: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine...
title_en: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine...
title_uk: Велика Британія розробляє для України нові ракети великої дальності...
description: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine without American components. As part of the Brakestop project, three British companies are creating cheaper analogues of Storm Shadow. The systems, developed by the British companies MBDA UK, MGI Engineering and Rotron Aerospace, successfully passed the tests that took place in the spring. The new missiles will be able to hit targets at a distance of more than 500 km and carry...
description_en: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine without American components. As part of the Brakestop project, three British companies are creating cheaper analogues of Storm Shadow. The systems, developed by the British companies MBDA UK, MGI Engineering and Rotron Aerospace, successfully passed the tests that took place in the spring. The new missiles will be able to hit targets at a distance of more than 500 km and carry...
description_uk: Великобритания разрабатывает для Украины новые дальнобойные ракеты без американских компонентов В рамках проекта Brakestop три британские компании создают более дешевые аналоги Storm Shadow. Cистемы, разработанные британскими компаниями MBDA UK, MGI Engineering и Rotron Aerospace, успешно прошли испытания, состоявшиеся весной. Новые ракеты смогут поражать цели на расстоянии более 500 км и нести...
